whpb_20231130_press_d_gpt-5-2025-08-07.coherence_explanation: Content is logically grouped and ordered, moving from broad context to specific themes (engagement, infrastructure, security, global issues, and Q&A-driven topics). whpb_20231130_press_d_gpt-5-2025-08-07.tone_explanation: The tone is consistently professional, objective, and neutral, suitable for stakeholder review.
